mapper.select:
SELECT seq, writer, title, content,pwd,hit,regdate,filename FROM(SELECT a.*, rownum rnum FROM (SELECT * FROM springboard
title like '%' || #{keyWord} || '%'
writer like '%' || #{keyWord} || '%'
content like '%' || #{keyWord} || '%'
title like '%' || #{keyWord} || '%' or writer like '%' || #{keyWord} || '%' or content like '%' || #{keyWord} || '%'
ORDER BY seq desc)a)
WHERE rnum >= #{start} AND rnum <= #{end}

SELECT count(*) FROM springboard
title like '%' || #{keyWord} || '%'
writer like '%' || #{keyWord} || '%'
content like '%' || #{keyWord} || '%'
title like '%' || #{keyWord} || '%' or writer like '%' || #{keyWord} || '%' or content like '%' || #{keyWord} || '%'
